General.Name: Sharps Technology Inc
General.Description: Sharps Technology, Inc., a medical device and pharmaceutical packaging company, provides smart-safety syringe products to the healthcare industry. Its product lines focus on providing waste capabilities that incorporate syringe technologies. The company, through a digital asset treasury strategy, focuses on accumulating Solana (SOL), the native digital asset of the Solana blockchain. The company was incorporated in 2017 and is based in Melville, New York.
General.Address: 105 Maxess Road, Melville, NY, United States, 11747
